$comment: Release self-declaration consumed by the unified registry's auto-core-release resolver (sh2-plugin-registry/scripts/resolve-core-candidate.mjs) at the git tag being released. The supports.* semver ranges decide whether a tagged core can be auto-matched with the latest published counterparts into a signed release candidate PR. Keep pluginApiVersion in sync with config/services.yaml (CI enforces it) and widen/bump supports.frontend deliberately - while the platform is pre-1.0, every 0.x minor is breaking. Raise supports.frontend's lower bound whenever core changes/removes an API contract the frontend depends on: the floor 0.1.23 is the frontend release that adopts the full 0.1.15 style-schema contract - the mobile-rendering taxonomy (style `renderTarget`, required field `scope`, the shared_/web_ field split with `pages.id_platform` removed in favour of the page access type) PLUS the alert/badge/avatar/button/login authoring-polish wave (alert `web_with_close_button` renamed to common `closable`; button/badge promoted to `shared_variant` with `web_variant` repurposed/unlinked; badge `circle`; avatar `name`; login `subtitle`), so an older frontend that still reads the pre-rename field names can never be auto-assembled with this core into a release.
